# Authentication

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Manage authentication tokens for constructive-functions (shared across all targets)

## Usage

```bash
constructive-functions auth set-token <token>
constructive-functions auth status
constructive-functions auth logout
```

## Examples

### Authenticate with a token

```bash
constructive-functions auth set-token eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...
```

### Check auth status

```bash
constructive-functions auth status
```
